name: Fun See Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Thinly sliced Dark chicken meat
1/2 cup Thinly sliced Chinese pea pods
recipeInstructions:
1. If Fun See bean threads are not available, use vermicelli instead.
2. Slice the chicken thinly.
3. Soak the bean threads in cold water for 20 minutes. Drain and set aside. You should have about 2 cups of noodles.
4. Combine 2 teaspoons of oil, cornstarch, and both soy sauces in a bowl.
5. Add the chicken to the marinade and let it stand for 20 minutes.
6. Heat a wok or skillet with vegetable oil over high heat until hot.
7. Rub the surface of the pan with a crushed garlic clove, then discard the garlic.
8. Add the marinated chicken and marinade to the hot pan. Stir-fry over high heat for 3 minutes.
9. Add the mushrooms and stir for 1 minute.
10. Add the cabbage and stir-fry for 2 minutes. Then add the bamboo shoots and bean sprouts, stirring for 1 minute after each addition.
11. Pour in about 2 cups of water, cover the pan, and bring to a boil.
12. Remove the lid, add the noodles, and stir well to combine. Cover and cook for 1 more minute.
13. Remove the lid again, add the peas, and stir-fry for 1 minute.
14. Quickly stir in sugar if desired, then remove from heat.
15. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 to 6 servings
